why: default literature RAG selected nearest-style cards and did not improve over pure EOH
regret insertion adds lookahead via second-best insertion cost
farthest insertion adds spatial diversity and can steer away from nearest-neighbor collapse
rag_query: tsp construct regret farthest lookahead route length
expected_effect: bias generation toward regret/farthest selection instead of nearest-only selection
notes: TSP has external repeat evidence in local notes; this row records the Phase 4 smoke decision and outcome only.

why: old/default CVRP literature RAG over-weighted nearest/capacity cards and was worse than pure EOH
regret insertion adds lookahead for customer choice under capacity constraints
far-first adds distance diversity and can counter capacity-first local bias
rag_query: cvrp regret lookahead detour farthest cluster route length
expected_effect: bias generation toward regret-aware far-first customer selection instead of nearest/capacity-only selection
notes: CVRP needs repeat=3 before writing stable-effect language.
